pitch_summary: One-page seller brief frames the before/after: Google has strong proof but no owned website, while the preview centralizes call, directions, hours, review proof, Veracruz-specific menu story, mobile CTAs, and safe concierge handoffs.
battle_card_summary: Owner talking points, objections, proof, risks, and demo path are recorded; strongest close emphasizes converting scattered Google proof into calls and directions without fake ordering or menu claims.

verification.json_valid: checklist and writeback payload validated with python3 -m json.tool
verification.truth_safety: docs explicitly ban fake online ordering, fake menu pricing, overclaimed seating, catering/allergy/reservation promises, and unverified provider claims
